rule_primitives.label: At least N events
rule_primitives.description: Require a minimum count of events (rows) in a domain within a time window

min_distinct_dates.description: If true, count distinct event dates (not just row count)

min_distinct_visits.description: If true, count distinct visit_occurrence_id values

rule_primitives.label: Value threshold
rule_primitives.description: Require measurement/observation values to meet a numeric threshold

value.description: Threshold value (or lower bound if between)

rule_primitives.label: Temporal sequence
rule_primitives.description: Require one event to occur before another by X days

min_days_before.description: Minimum days event A must precede event B

same_day_allowed.description: If true, events on the same day satisfy the constraint

same_visit_required.description: If true, both events must occur in the same visit

rule_primitives.label: Concept set selection
rule_primitives.description: Select events by a named concept set with optional descendant expansion or exclusions

include_descendants.description: Include descendant concepts in addition to direct matches

validity.description: Whether to require invalid_reason IS NULL

rule_primitives.label: Encounter context
rule_primitives.description: Filter events by visit type (inpatient, outpatient, ED, etc.)

rule_primitives.label: Therapy/medication exposure
rule_primitives.description: Filter drug exposures by route, dose, refill pattern, or era-based logic

use_era.description: Use drug_era table (combines overlapping exposures) instead of raw drug_exposure

rule_primitives.label: NLP note concept hit
rule_primitives.description: Require concept mentions in clinical notes with optional negation/uncertainty filters

note_nlp_concept_ids.description: Concept IDs to search in note_nlp

exclude_negated.description: Exclude mentions marked as negated (if available)

exclude_uncertain.description: Exclude mentions marked as uncertain (if available)

rule_primitives.label: Exclusion rule
rule_primitives.description: Exclude persons or rows based on a condition (prior disease, medication, etc.)

exclusion_scope.description: When to apply the exclusion: ever before index, during baseline, or anytime before index

operators.description: At least one rule must be satisfied

temporal_anchors.description: Start of baseline window relative to index_date
End of baseline window relative to index_date
